testcase.name: test_mime_field_present_on_list

failure.message: AssertionError: List response missing 'mime' field on item assert 'mime' in {'aspect_ratio': '1:1', 'created_at': '2026-06-06T10:55:03.650383+00:00', 'data': '...', 'id': 'img_2a75ca8ddc644d59', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vortex_phase2.py:277: in test_mime_field_present_on_list assert "mime" in it, "List response missing 'mime' field on item" E AssertionError: List response missing 'mime' field on item E assert 'mime' in {'aspect_ratio': '1:1', 'created_at': '2026-06-06T10:55:03.650383+00:00', 'data': '...', 'id': 'img_2a75ca8ddc644d59', ...}
